content: follow up question, should I be looking at `snobal-devnet` or `bal` fixtures for the latest amsterdam spec?

content: For bleeding edge, prob [this](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-snobal-devnet-6@v1.1.1), but I will be double checking with the testing team tomorrow if there is (or will be soon) a new stable EEST release to rebase zkevm with the latest stuff. I can keep you posted.
